description: You are a security manager at a commercial office building. Transform the raw text in /home/ga/Documents/emergency_action_plan_raw.docx into a professionally formatted OSHA-compliant Emergency Action Plan (EAP) for the 'Meridian Business Center'. The document title must use a Title style, with Heading 1 for the eight major sections and Heading 2 for subsections. Extract information from the prose to create formatted tables for the Emergency Contact Directory (Name, Title, Office Phone, Cell Phone), Floor Warden Assignments (Floor, Primary Warden, Alternate Warden), Evacuation Assembly Points (Exit, Route Description, Assembly Point), and Emergency Equipment Inventory (Item, Location, Quantity). Format the body text using a consistent 11pt or 12pt font and bold the keywords 'EVACUATE', 'SHELTER IN PLACE', 'LOCKDOWN', 'CALL 911', and 'DO NOT' wherever they appear. Save the formatted document to /home/ga/Documents/emergency_action_plan_formatted.docx.
